Appropriation of $100,000, received from the mass broadband institute to the grant fund library other ordinary maintenance account. funds will be used to help support local digital navigators and provide devices to residents in need, including the distribution of up to 190 laptops and hotspots to qualifying residents in need; and supporting the work of digital navigators serving individuals at the cambridge public library and cambridge public schools.
